heading: Bonds; limitation of issuance under sections 831n and 831n–1
label: 831n–2 Bonds; limitation of issuance under sections 831n and 831n–1
text: No bonds shall be issued by the Corporation after the date of enactment of this section under section 831n or 831n–1 of this title.
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of this section, referred to in text, probably means .July 26, 1939
